titleStmt.title: SII 9.142: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 142. (A.R. No. 523 of 1915.) ON A STONE LYING NEAR THE SLUICE OF KARIM SAHIB TANK AT CHINNATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated [Chālukya-Vi]krama year 4, Siddhārthi, Jyēshṭha, śu. 10, Bṛihaspativāra. In Siddhārthin, Jyēshṭha, śu. 10 corresponded to A.D. 1079 May 13 Monday, not Thursday as stated; but in Kāḷayukti, the tithi did fall on Thursday = 24th May A.D. 1078. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jōyimayyarasa made a gift to Srīdhara-Bhaṭṭa when the former was ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand. The record is damaged.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattri
bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśva
ra śrīmatu maṁḍaḷikamadanamahēśvara nijakuḷakuvaḷayasudhākaraṁ vinayaratnākaraṁ seṇasumaṇḍa
ḷikataleya karavattanabhinavacārudatta suttaṁbaḷasuva maṇḍaḷikara maṇḍeyanaḷi
va maṟevugekāvaṁ viṣamaturagārūḍhaprauḍharēkhārēvantanahitakṛtāntaṁ śrīmallikārjju
labdhavaraprasādaṁ . caṁḍakō nudhaya nacalitadhairyyaṁ śrīmattri
vanamalladēvapēsaṇagaruḍaṁ jayalakṣmīniḷayaṁ svasti samastaprasastisahi
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ jōyimayyarasarssiṁdavāḍi sāsirama
tṛbhōgābhyaṁtarasuddhiyināḷdu sukhadinarasugeyyuttamire
kramavarṣada 4 neya siddhārtthi saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭa suddha 10 bṛhaspati
damaged
śrīma
śrīdharabhaṭṭaṁge
Ī dharmmakkāvanānu vakranādava
prayūgeyoḷaṁ sāsi
ra kavile
yakage
paṇḍitaronduvare bāgamanuṇbar
maṁ tapaṇḍita puṭṭida santatiyuṇbar .
Digital edition of SII 9.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
